Metadata.Goal: 将 AI runtime 的 load/resume/save/effect lifecycle 主流程切换到 ai-runtime-control engine owned mode，并移除旧 shadow/compatibility bypass。
Metadata.Description: 基于已完成的 runtime-control engine、composer 和 session-upgrade 能力，真正落地 AI runtime 主流程切换，确保 owned checkpoint 是恢复一致性边界。

TaskSpace.name: land-ai-runtime-control-engine
TaskSpace.Description: 落地 AI Runtime Control Engine

Task.name: 添加 load/resume owned gate failing tests
Task.Description: 为已升级 clean session、未升级旧 session、dirty/orphaned session、内部 bypass recovery API 添加测试，先确认当前旧路径缺口。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 测试覆盖 upgraded clean session 可 load/resume
测试覆盖未升级旧 session 被要求先升级
测试覆盖 dirty/orphaned blockers 不被静默恢复
测试覆盖 lower-level recovery API 不能绕过 owned gate

Task.name: 实现生产 load/resume owned gate
Task.Description: 将 runtime recovery 主入口切到 owned checkpoint gate，读取 upgrade marker、checkpoint marker、real heads 和 effect evidence 后再进入 VM recovery。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: repository.loadSnapshot 前执行 owned gate
缺 marker 时返回明确 upgrade-required 错误
生产恢复路径不再 fallback 到 shadow mode

Task.name: 添加 checkpoint ownership regression tests
Task.Description: 用测试确认 checkpoint concrete writes 由 composer/runtime-control engine 驱动，非 safepoint 不提交 authoritative marker。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 测试覆盖 concrete writers 作为 support effect 运行
测试覆盖 mandatory work 阻止 checkpoint marker 提交

Task.name: 移除 save path shadow/bypass owner
Task.Description: 删除或封闭 RuntimeSnapshots 中旧 direct writer owner 和 shadow checkpoint production fallback，保留 support effect 实现。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: save 主流程只调用 runtime-control composer checkpoint API
旧 concrete writers 不再决定一致性完成
snapshot safepoint 与 recovery 测试继续通过

Task.name: 同步 checkpoint save owned metadata
Task.Description: checkpoint cohort commit 成功后由 runtime-control composer 同步 owned checkpoint metadata，确保 upgrade marker 与当前 checkpoint marker/head sequences 保持一致。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 成功 save 后 runtime-control/upgrade.json 指向当前 checkpoint marker
升级 session 后再次 save 仍可通过生产 owned recovery gate

Task.name: 添加 direct evidence import scan tests
Task.Description: 添加测试或脚本扫描，防止 executor/coordinator/support 直接 import file-store evidence writer，要求走 runtime-control facade。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 测试扫描禁止非 support/composer owner 直接调用 appendRuntimeControlEffectEvidence
tool/provider/permission/questionnaire lifecycle 回归测试通过

Task.name: 收敛 effect lifecycle facade
Task.Description: 按需补充 runtime-level facade，确保 effect request/result/waiting 统一进入 engine，并保留 long-running/permission wait 恢复分类。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 运行态 effect lifecycle 只有一个正式写入入口
waiting/pending effects 恢复分类明确

Task.name: 固化 projection/cache recovery tests
Task.Description: 确认 derived indexes 缺失、过期或损坏时，clean owned checkpoint 仍可恢复并刷新 projection。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 测试覆盖 derived indexes 不作为 durable recovery blocker

Task.name: 固化 journal sink boundary tests
Task.Description: 确认 ingress/diagnostics XNL 作为 journal sink 参与诊断但不受 checkpoint safepoint 管理。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 测试覆盖 journal sink 事件数变化不阻止 clean checkpoint recovery

Task.name: 固化历史 incident conformance cases
Task.Description: 将 unpaired tool output、duplicate human input、removed handler、multi-head mismatch、late completion、start_tool half-step 等历史问题作为 engine landing conformance tests。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 历史问题均有 engine landing conformance coverage
重复工具调用类脏 tail 不会恢复成可继续运行状态

Task.name: 验证已升级真实 session smoke
Task.Description: 用已通过 session-upgrade 的真实历史 session 验证 dry-run clean，并通过 runtime load/resume smoke 检查不会立刻停下。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 真实 session dry-run classification 为 clean
真实 session load/resume smoke 不触发 owned gate 错误或立即停止回归

Task.name: 最终替换就绪扫描
Task.Description: 扫描 RuntimeSnapshots、Executor、Coordinator、TUI/CLI recovery/upgrade 入口，确认无旧 shadow/compatibility owner、无 direct evidence writer、无 bypass recovery。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 无生产 shadow fallback owner
无非 owner direct evidence writer
codument validate land-ai-runtime-control-engine --strict 通过

TaskGroup.name: runtime semantic cut and autonomous repro

Task.name: 添加 headless 指定 session 恢复执行能力
Task.Description: 让 eidolon CLI 能指定 session id 加载已有 session 并发送输入，用于自动复现“恢复后请继续”的真实现场，不依赖 TUI 人工操作。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: CLI exec/run 支持传入 session id 并传递到 runtime bridge
单元测试覆盖 session id 参数映射

Task.name: 添加 runtime checkpoint diagnostics
Task.Description: 在 diagnostics.xnl 记录 checkpoint safepoint/save/skip/drift 事件，用于区分运行中写出问题与恢复读取问题。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 诊断日志包含 checkpoint start/skip/saved/drift 事件
新增诊断仍保持 journal sink，不作为 checkpoint blocker

Task.name: 复现 checkpoint 取样后 effect evidence 漂移
Task.Description: 在 composer/engine 测试中模拟 checkpoint writer 期间 effect evidence 追加，证明旧实现会提交 evidence-ahead-of-snapshot 的 authoritative marker。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 测试覆盖 writer 窗口追加 effect evidence
测试场景描述为运行中写出问题，而非历史 session 清理问题

Task.name: 从 runtime-control engine 层用 WAL cursor 定义 checkpoint cut
Task.Description: checkpoint prepare 记录 effect WAL logical cursor；writer-window 内追加的 LLM/tool evidence 留作 WAL tail，不纳入本次 checkpoint prefix，也不触发 drift guard。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: writer 窗口 effect evidence 追加时 checkpoint marker 仍提交，但 effectEvidenceSequence 保持 prepare cursor
无漂移时 checkpoint 正常提交且现有 recovery 测试通过
